name: Aswadh Dog Food Feeder Pet Puzzle Activity Toys Game Training Bowl Interactive Play Round Green
description: Description:This treat dispensing toy isn't just a fun toy; it is also a great mental excersie toy to train and stimulate your pets mind and senseEquipped with small sections to hold pet food separately, can easily prevent your dog from eating too fast and reduce choking risks, also can add more fun when feeding your dog or cat.Colorful designs are great at stimulating your pets visual sense. This puzzle toy keeps your pets mind healthy and activeNon-slip pads on the bottom allow for stable and secure placing to prevent food from overflow, relieving you from cleaning the floor each time.Sturdy
